name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
summary: Provides Rs. 6,000 per year to eligible farmer families, paid in 3 equal installments of Rs. 2,000 directly into bank accounts.
eligibility: All landholding farmer families, subject to exclusion criteria (income tax payers, institutional landholders, etc).

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
summary: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers in case of crop failure due to natural calamities, pests, or diseases.
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas, both loanee and non-loanee farmers.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
summary: Provides farmers with affordable credit for crop production, post-harvest expenses, and farm asset maintenance at subsidized interest rates.
eligibility: All farmers including tenant farmers, oral lessees, and sharecroppers.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
summary: Provides farmers with soil nutrient status and recommendations on appropriate dosage of nutrients for improving soil health and fertility.
eligibility: All farmers; card issued every 2 years per land holding.

name: National Agriculture Market (e-NAM)
summary: Online trading platform connecting existing APMC mandis to create a unified national market for agricultural commodities.
eligibility: Registered farmers and traders through local APMC mandis.

name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY)
summary: Aims to improve farm water use efficiency through micro-irrigation (drip/sprinkler) with subsidy support.
eligibility: All categories of farmers, with special focus on small and marginal farmers.

name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY)
summary: State-driven scheme to promote holistic development of agriculture and allied sectors through infrastructure and capacity building.
eligibility: State governments implement projects; benefits flow to farmers through state schemes.

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
summary: Promotes organic farming through cluster approach, providing financial assistance for organic inputs and certification.
eligibility: Farmer groups/clusters willing to adopt organic farming practices.
